tools.name: plugin_file_manager_status
tools.description: Check whether the plugin has Android all files access and report the managed storage root.

tools.name: plugin_file_manager_open_all_files_access_settings
tools.description: Open Android all files access settings for the File Manager Plugin.

tools.name: plugin_file_manager_list
tools.description: List files or folders under the external storage root after all files access is granted.

tools.name: plugin_file_manager_search
tools.description: Search file and folder names under a relative directory in external storage.

tools.name: plugin_file_manager_read_text
tools.description: Read a text file under external storage up to maxBytes.

tools.name: plugin_file_manager_create_file
tools.description: Create a new text file under external storage. Existing files are not overwritten.

tools.name: plugin_file_manager_write_text
tools.description: Create or update a text file under external storage.

tools.name: plugin_file_manager_create_folder
tools.description: Create a folder under external storage.

tools.name: plugin_file_manager_rename
tools.description: Rename one file or folder under external storage.

tools.name: plugin_file_manager_batch_rename_preview
tools.description: Preview batch rename changes and return a previewToken. This tool does not mutate files.

tools.name: plugin_file_manager_batch_rename_apply
tools.description: Apply a previously previewed batch rename. The previewToken from preview is required.

tools.name: plugin_file_manager_delete
tools.description: Delete one file or folder under external storage. Direct deletion is permanent for this MVP.

tools.name: plugin_file_manager_download
tools.description: Download an HTTPS URL to a relative path under external storage.

tools.name: plugin_youtube_video_info
tools.description: Read public metadata and actual download choices for exactly one supported YouTube video or Short. Video choices include exact width, height, and estimated bytes; audio choices include container, bitrate, and estimated bytes. This does not create a file.

tools.name: plugin_youtube_download
tools.description: Queue one public YouTube video or audio download after the user explicitly chooses a format returned by plugin_youtube_video_info. Video resolutions are exact and never silently downgraded. Returns a jobId immediately; downloading continues in a foreground service. If the same video URL is already queued or processing, returns that existing job with alreadyInProgress=true and performs no new action, even when another format was requested.

tools.name: plugin_youtube_download_status
tools.description: Read a local download job by jobId, or list recent jobs with cursor pagination when jobId is omitted.

tools.name: plugin_youtube_download_cancel
tools.description: Cancel an active local YouTube download and remove its unfinished staging files.
